purpose: Right-side context dock container for organ-specific cockpit panels.
truth_rules: Dock container is structural and must not claim readiness itself.
proof_requirements: Panel unit IDs resolve through visual address registry.
fake_green_risks: Dock cards can appear ready while child panels are stub.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
